intro.text: Name's Taro. Elite Four, Water and Earth. I've sailed every sea and walked every shore in this world. Let's see if you can weather my storm, kid.

win.text: Ha! You've got sea legs after all. Not many can ride out a squall like that. Go on, the next one's waiting.

lose.text: Washed ashore. The sea's no place for landlubbers. Come back when you've learned to swim with the current.
